strengths: Direct TypeScript/React/Node.js experience across multiple senior roles (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq) directly matches the required stack
Founded and runs GISCollective, an open-source platform deployed on Kubernetes — demonstrates fullstack ownership from database to UI plus infrastructure depth
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and active community teaching aligns with the role's clean architecture and learning-collaboration emphasis
concerns: No explicit PostgreSQL experience listed; database work has been primarily MongoDB and MySQL
Nest.js is not mentioned in the resume, though broad Node.js framework experience suggests fast ramp-up
Berlin-based candidate against a high on-site presence requirement — location fits but commute/availability unconfirmed

key_factors.factor: Fullstack ownership across DB, API, UI, and infra (GISCollective, Optilyz, RIDE)
AI/LLM and AWS/Kubernetes exposure covering nice-to-haves

response.justification: Bogdan brings exactly the core stack the role calls for — TypeScript, React, Node.js, REST APIs, and relational databases — applied across multiple production platforms including a Direct Mail automation system handling millions of sends and a fintech platform at RIDE. His founder work on GISCollective demonstrates end-to-end fullstack ownership including Kubernetes deployment, while his recent re:cinq role adds LLM/MCP and agentic-tooling experience that maps cleanly to the nice-to-have AI integration skills. Combined with a strong craftsmanship ethos (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) and a Berlin base supporting on-site work, he is well positioned to contribute immediately and grow with the platform.
